title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw designed for orchestrating agent swarms through Telegram with ephemeral Docker containers. It supports frameworks like Claude Code for customization and is built to be forked and rewritten by AI rather than requiring manual modification of large codebases.
